title: AI for Business Summit 2026
description: A full-day summit exploring how AI-powered virtual assistants and automation are transforming modern businesses. Expect keynotes, live product demos and plenty of networking with the AI-Solution team.

title: Hands-on Prototyping Workshop
description: A practical, hands-on workshop where you will build a working AI prototype in a single day using our affordable prototyping approach. Ideal for product managers, founders and developers.

title: Virtual Assistant Live Demo Day
description: Join us for a live demonstration of the AI-Solution virtual assistant. See how it handles customer questions, automates tasks and integrates with everyday business tools.
